autolab.description: Primary Autolab orchestrator: coordinates researcher, planner, worker, reporter for end-to-end autonomous experiment loops on fungal-cv-qdrant

superagent.description: Primary autonomous delivery agent for MycoAI product and research workflows

autoresearch.description: Autoresearch loop agent for fungal classification experiments

researcher.description: Literature scout: searches web and HF papers, converts PDFs via markitdown, extracts methodology, validates fit, writes hypotheses to research/paper-ideas.md

planner.description: Experiment queue coordinator: reads paper-ideas.md, deduplicates, assigns run_ids and branches, updates results.tsv, returns worker assignments to Autolab

worker.description: Isolated experiment worker: creates a git worktree, modifies run_accuracy.py, runs prepare.py, appends result to shared CSV with file lock, cleans up

reporter.description: Experiment observer: reads staircase CSV and results.tsv, emits status summary, logs Trackio event, optionally syncs to HF Hub

prepare.description: Scaffolds new experiment folders with program.md, prepare.py, run_accuracy.py

test-writer.description: Writes focused backend/frontend tests and small harness updates when needed

test-runner.description: Runs repo-specific checks, groups failures, and returns actionable summaries

manual-browser-tester.description: Performs manual browser or API validation and records definition-of-done evidence

e2e-writer.description: Authors or updates end-to-end tests for scientist-facing user journeys

create-new-pr.description: Prepares and opens PRs for the monorepo or a submodule using git history, base diff, and spec-plan-task context

write-report.description: Writes or updates repos/fungal-cv-qdrant experiment reports and compiles them with linked image assets

diagram-renderer.description: Creates Mermaid or Python-generated diagrams and returns report-relative asset paths

vast-ai-runner.description: Runs canonical Vast.ai workflows from the local control plane and captures remote execution results

vast-ai-setup.description: Prepares Vast.ai CLI, machine selection, SSH readiness, and shared-storage prerequisites

sync-data.description: Configures and runs non-destructive Dataset/results/weights sync via the canonical rclone workflow

explore.description: Fast read-only agent for exploring codebases
